Interface ILasSurface2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members of LasSurface.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("E94ED3E7-5C73-4352-9ACE-4D64771F7D25")]
public interface ILasSurface2 : ILasSurface

Properties

CanDoCurvature 

bool CanDoCurvature { get; }

Property Value

bool

LasDataset

The source LasDataset from which the LasSurface was derived.

ILasDataset LasDataset { get; }

Property Value

ILasDataset
